title: Ametavlito Totems
description: A small mod that resurrects all the players who died and other totems.
body:
# About mod This mod adds a large number of totems. # How use
Totem Of Return The totem resurrects only within a radius of 10 * 10 blocks (If you rename the totem to the nickname of the player you want to resurrect, everything will work without distance restrictions)
The Unfinished Totem of Return Rename the totem to the nickname of the player you want to resurrect. The first time you use it, you have 3 hearts left, and the second time you die.
Totem of Vampirism When activated, it deals damage to mobs within a radius of 5 blocks from the player and imposes a regeneration mode on the player. All indicators depend on the current and maximum health of the player.
Totem of Regeneration When pressed, RMB heals all players within a 5 block radius of the player and deals some damage to the owner.
Totem of Levitation When you press RMB, all mobs and players within a 5 block radius of you rise into the air.
# Coming Soon 1. Update to 1.20.4 2. New Totems # WARNING A person is reborn not in the same place where he died.
